message:
Running command: 
PROJECT_PATH="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
MCU_DIR="$PROJECT_PATH/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Full MCU dir tree (2 levels) ==="
find "$MCU_DIR" -maxdepth 2 -not -path '*/\.*' | sort

echo ""
echo "=== Any config.json anywhere under MCU dir ==="
find "$MCU_DIR" -name "config.json" 2>/dev/null | sort

echo ""
echo "=== Any existing runs directories ==="
find "$MCU_DIR" -type d -name "runs" 2>/dev/null | sort
